steps.title: Turn the rate into a table
steps.content: The problem gives $(2,23)$. Since every increase of $1$ in $x$ increases $y$ by $9$, the next point is $(3,32)$. Enter those two rows in Desmos.

steps.title: Fit a line
steps.content: Type $y_1\sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=9$ and $b=5$, so the model is $y=9x+5$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Choice C is $y=9x+5$. It has the required rate of change $9$, and $9(2)+5=23$, so choice C is correct.
